bulletpoints: Developed and tested multiple machine learning models with Scikit-learn and TensorFlow that predict student enrollment given factors like engagement with marketing campaigns, country, level of study, etc.

Designed and implemented a historic enrollment analysis dashboard by integrating 7 years of applicant and enrollment data, enabling stakeholders to track key performance indicators (KPIs), identify trends, and evaluate cyclical performance for data-driven decision making.
Engineered Python and Google Apps Script automation tools to clean and import operational data (prospective, applicant, agents, etc.), significantly improving data accuracy and productivity.
Supervised and mentored multiple team members in advanced data cleaning and importing procedures.

companyOrSchool: Faculty of Business Administration - Lakehead University
bulletpoints: Conducts social media sentiment analysis and topic modelling to find out what workplace demands and resources are present for individuals experiencing ADHD or menopause.
Cleans, processes, and analyzes large text datasets using Python to extract key themes and behavioral trends.
Contributed analytical findings to a research paper accepted for presentation at ASAC 2025 and AOM 2025.
